content.emptyDesc: Add a service to show clients what you offer, how you can help, and make booking you easy.

pricing.title: Price & scope
pricing.deliveryHolder: How many days to deliver the service?

gallery.title: Requirements and steps
gallery.imagesDesc: Upload up to 20 images (.jpg or .png), up to 10MB each and less than 4,000 pixels, in width or height.

process.title: Requirements and steps
process.infoTitle: Info you'll need from the client
process.infoDesc: Request any details or files you’ll need from the client to begin the project. Clients can respond with text or attachments. Be sure to include at least one requirement.
process.requirementHolder: Add any details or files needed to start your project

description.title: Service description
description.summaryDesc: Highlight what makes your service or project unique and valuable to clients.

review.readyDesc: Make sure everything is set before you go live. Just a few final checks!
review.legalText: Please confirm that the content you're about to publish is either original or properly licensed, and that it aligns with our community guidelines.
review.termsIntro: I have read and agree to the
review.privacyText: By submitting and activating this service, you agree that it will appear in public search results and may be visible even if your profile is set to private or restricted to registered users only.

delete.deleteDesc: Are you sure you want to delete the service ?
